---
title: "Analysis Report"
author: "Your Name"
date: today
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    toc-location: left
    number-sections: true
    code-fold: show
    code-tools: true
    code-copy: true
    embed-resources: true
    theme: cosmo
    html-math-method: katex
    fig-width: 8
    fig-height: 6
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
  message: false
---

# Introduction

Describe the purpose and scope of this analysis.

## Background

Provide context and background information.

# Data

## Data Loading

```{python}
#| label: setup
#| echo: true

import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import seaborn as sns

# Set visualization defaults
sns.set_theme(style="whitegrid")
plt.rcParams['figure.dpi'] = 100
```

```{python}
#| label: load-data
#| echo: true

# Load your data
# data = pd.read_csv("path/to/data.csv")

# Example data
data = pd.DataFrame({
    'x': np.random.randn(100),
    'y': np.random.randn(100),
    'category': np.random.choice(['A', 'B', 'C'], 100)
})
```

## Data Description

```{python}
#| label: tbl-summary
#| tbl-cap: "Summary Statistics"
#| echo: false

data.describe()
```

# Analysis

## Exploratory Analysis

```{python}
#| label: fig-distribution
#| fig-cap: "Distribution of Variables"
#| echo: true

fig, axes = plt.subplots(1, 2, figsize=(12, 4))

axes[0].hist(data['x'], bins=20, edgecolor='black')
axes[0].set_title('Distribution of X')
axes[0].set_xlabel('X')
axes[0].set_ylabel('Frequency')

axes[1].hist(data['y'], bins=20, edgecolor='black')
axes[1].set_title('Distribution of Y')
axes[1].set_xlabel('Y')
axes[1].set_ylabel('Frequency')

plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()
```

## Main Results

```{python}
#| label: fig-scatter
#| fig-cap: "Relationship between X and Y"
#| echo: true

plt.figure(figsize=(8, 6))
sns.scatterplot(data=data, x='x', y='y', hue='category', alpha=0.6)
plt.title('Scatter Plot of X vs Y')
plt.xlabel('X')
plt.ylabel('Y')
plt.legend(title='Category')
plt.show()
```

# Discussion

Interpret the results and discuss implications.

## Key Findings

- Finding 1: Describe important result
- Finding 2: Describe important result
- Finding 3: Describe important result

## Limitations

Discuss any limitations of the analysis.

# Conclusion

Summarize main conclusions and next steps.

# References {.unnumbered}

List any references or data sources used.

# Appendix {.unnumbered}

## Additional Information

Include supplementary materials here.

```{python}
#| label: session-info
#| echo: false

import sys
print(f"Python version: {sys.version}")
print(f"Pandas version: {pd.__version__}")
print(f"NumPy version: {np.__version__}")
```
